hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[|&;({])[[:space:]]*(grep|egrep|fgrep)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use ripgrep (rg) instead of grep/egrep/fgrep: faster and respects .gitignore. Search files via the built-in Grep tool; filter output by piping into rg. (Only grep in command position is blocked; pgrep, zgrep, git grep, sudo grep are unaffected.)"}}'; fi
